since_last: 68% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +5.40%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 68% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.46% · BTC +1.13% · Gold +1.61% · Nasdaq100 +1.50%. 68% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +5.40%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +5.40%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.29%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +11.46%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +11.46%, KLAC +11.22%, LRCX +10.30%, AMAT +9.94%, TER +8.47%. Laggards: AVAV -5.14%, PLTR -3.33%, SOUN -3.31%, IBM -2.51%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.15% at $150.0
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.15% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
